prose:
**Aniline frontier–orbital gap** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in PySCF (2024.1), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`, no geometry optimization (single-point DFT//input-xyz). SCF converged in 9 cycles; no warnings reported.
HOMO = –5.553772 eV, LUMO = –0.2489544 eV → **gap = 5.3048177 eV**.

Reproducibility:
• Command:
  `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp0z4ninlf/live.json`
• Output JSON: `aniline_frontier_dft.json` (contains full result)
• Live log (while running) was written to `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory (tail -f to follow).
